race.description: 2026 Nov Keeneland Breeding Stock Sale Hcp
race.comment: SOUTHERN HEIRESS (3) has been around the mark in her past two runs, including a solid fourth over 1200m at Canterbury after racing prominently throughout, and if she strikes her preferred wet ground, she can take this out. HORSESHOE HILL (4) resumed in the Fireball Stakes at Randwick 18 days ago and, after getting back from a slow start, she ran on nicely late that day. She will find this company more suitable, and can be a quick improver. Include. SURF'S UP (2) resumes after a spell, and she showed plenty of ability during the spring. She has won a recent trial with JMac in the saddle, and he keeps the faith here. Follow the market moves. LIGHTHOUSE LASS (10) drops in weight third up, and she is worth including.
